hero.title: Your company moves faster, with more intelligence and better decisions
hero.subtitle: We automate processes, reduce operating costs and turn data into decisions — so your company operates at a scale impossible for humans alone.
hero.scroll: scroll to see how we build

steps.s0_title: Your team wastes hours on tasks a machine should handle
steps.s0_body: Manual processes, scattered data, slow decisions. Every lost hour is money that doesn't come back.
steps.s1_title: We automate the repetitive so your team does what matters
steps.s1_body: We connect your processes, integrate your data sources and build the system that runs for you.
steps.s2_title: Lower costs. More speed. Real-time decisions
steps.s2_body: Our clients cut hours of manual work and get actionable information instantly.
steps.s3_body: 4 active systems today. We don't sell promises — we deliver software that is already generating results.

about.title: A team that builds where others just automate.
about.body: Delta Analytics is a technology company founded by a team of students and developers who decided to turn real problems into software that works. We didn't start from an abstract idea of 'innovation' — we started from processes we saw fail up close: slow financial analysis, disorganized clinic management. And we built the tool that was missing.

mission.mission_body: Reduce the operational cost of companies through AI automation — delivering software that works from day one, without endless projects or filler consultants.
mission.vision_body: Be the company that proves three people with the right tools can do what used to require an entire department — and sell that model to whoever needs it.

products.title: Four products. One approach.
products.subtitle: Each one solves a real problem. None of them is a mockup.
products.tradeiq_desc: AI-powered trading analysis platform. Structured signals with entry, stop-loss and take-profit, confidence scoring across multiple timeframes and AI chat to validate setups in real time.
products.odonto_desc: Full automation for dental clinics: voice agent for appointments, smart WhatsApp for patient follow-up and a simple CRM so the office runs without friction.
products.atum_desc: Intelligence operating system for companies. Analytics dashboards, market intelligence, Google Analytics integrated and real-time operational decision automation.
products.sales_desc: Autonomous sales pipeline. Lead scraping, outbound voice agent, WhatsApp follow-up and integrated CRM — all connected to close clients without manual intervention.

contact.title: Do you have a problem worth solving with AI?
contact.subtitle: Tell us what you need. We respond personally — no automated filler forms.
contact.name: Name
contact.message_placeholder: Tell us about your project or need...
contact.thanks: Thanks. We'll get back to you within 24 hours.

footer.tagline: Built with data, AI and coffee.
